name: course-docs-site
description: Shared site runtime for metyatech course documentation

scripts.build: npm run sync:content && npm run verify:content && next build
scripts.build:verified: npm run sync:content && npm run verify:content && cross-env COURSE_DOCS_SKIP_BUILD_LINT=1 COURSE_DOCS_SKIP_BUILD_TYPECHECK=1 next build && npm run pagefind
scripts.typecheck: npm run sync:content && npm run verify:content && next typegen && tsc --noEmit
scripts.test:fast: npm run verify:sites && npm run test:e2e-config && npm run test:admin-security && node scripts/run-node-tests-sequential.mjs tests/course-sites-manifest.test.mjs tests/git-auth-context.test.mjs tests/git-origin-normalize.test.mjs tests/git-remote-ref.test.mjs tests/sync-course-content-clears-next.test.mjs tests/sync-course-content-failure-redaction.test.mjs tests/sync-course-content-link-mode.test.mjs tests/sync-course-content-origin-url-normalize.test.mjs tests/sync-course-content-pre-network-repair.test.mjs tests/sync-course-content-private-remote-auth.test.mjs tests/sync-course-content-public-remote.test.mjs tests/sync-course-content-remote-cache.test.mjs tests/tutorial-shots.test.mjs tests/verify-content.test.mjs
scripts.test:shared: npm run test:e2e-config && node --test --test-concurrency=1 tests/admin-mode-legacy-token.test.mjs && node scripts/run-node-tests-sequential.mjs tests/git-auth-context.test.mjs tests/git-origin-normalize.test.mjs tests/git-remote-ref.test.mjs tests/import-asset-resolution.test.mjs tests/sync-course-content-clears-next.test.mjs tests/sync-course-content-link-mode.test.mjs tests/sync-course-content-pre-network-repair.test.mjs tests/sync-course-content-remote-cache.test.mjs tests/tutorial-shots.test.mjs && node scripts/run-tutorial-shot-editor-flow-tests.mjs
scripts.test:e2e-config: node --test --test-concurrency=1 tests/dependency-security-contracts.test.mjs tests/e2e-course-defaults.test.mjs tests/next-dist-dir.test.mjs tests/next-config-assets.test.mjs tests/pagefind-platform-binary.test.mjs tests/sanitize-git-error.test.mjs tests/test-harness-env.test.mjs tests/verification-contracts.test.mjs
scripts.test:dev-switch: node scripts/run-node-tests-sequential.mjs tests/dev-switch.test.mjs tests/import-asset-resolution.test.mjs tests/sync-course-content-clears-next.test.mjs tests/sync-course-content-does-not-touch-source.test.mjs tests/submissions-route-source.test.mjs tests/mdx-boundary-source.test.mjs tests/e2e-content-source.test.mjs tests/intro-image-resolution.test.mjs tests/asset-route-trace-config.test.mjs && node --import tsx --test --test-concurrency=1 tests/admin-mode-route-protection.test.mjs && node --test --test-concurrency=1 tests/admin-mode-legacy-token.test.mjs
scripts.verify:precommit: npm run verify:sites && npm run lint && npm test
scripts.verify:course: npm run lint && npm run test:course && npm run build:verified
scripts.verify:course:ci: npm run verify:sites && npm run test:course:ci && npm run build:verified
scripts.verify:ci: npm run verify:sites && npm run audit:ci && npm run build && npm run verify:course:ci
